interactions.summary: From when? I mean from December. This year? Yes, that is correct, yes. So between the age of 18 and 25, you think, and what does that really mean? I've not really experienced that in my lifetime. So it means that if you're between the age of 18 and 24, either gender? No, male. Male, then you have to sign up for the army? No, you're already put into a draft. Oh, you're already, okay, but you might be called upon. That...
